economic_notes: Nation holds equity investments in multiple business partnerships including Shxw Kwimel Cha Limited Partnership (99%), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Limited Partnership (14%), Centre Creek Limited Partnership (11%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Forestry Limited Partnership (13%), and Skynest Limited Partnership (10%). Portfolio investments managed by Connor Clark & Lunn Private Capital Ltd and Leith Wheeler Investment Counsel Ltd totalling ~$6.84M were newly established in 2022.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Province is BC. Nation holds 5 business partnerships accounted for under modified equity method and 6 government business enterprises under portfolio investment method. Property Taxation department is the only consolidated subsidiary. Gain on sale of tangible capital asset of $643,877 recorded. New FNFA interim loan of $3,016,440 drawn in 2022. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($2,590,723) + CMHC ($192,250) + Province of BC ($2,519,874) + Environment Canada ($30,000) + Sto:lo Nation ($164,741) + FNESC ($69,689) + FN Land Management Resource Centre ($40,300) + BC Hydro ($40,511) - Home Owners Grants are included as negative revenue offset. No schedule of remuneration was included in the document provided.
